name: PandaPick demonstration generator
robot: Franka Emika Panda (7-DOF arm + parallel gripper), MjSpec-composed scene
controller: scripted resolved-rate (damped-least-squares Jacobian) IK on mj_jacSite, with interpolated joint-target trajectories; gripper as a position actuator
role: expert LABELLER / demonstration generator (deterministic, by design) — NOT a learned policy; no RL is claimed
integrity: cubes are freejoint bodies; NO teleport, NO weld, NO equality shortcut. Every reported number is read live from the MuJoCo simulation (mj_forward/qpos/mj_jacSite/mj_contactForce) and cross-checked by validate_submission.py (README == benchmark.json). Sim-only; no real-robot claims.
compute: CPU only, no GPU; one command (python run.py)
